experience.description: Handling QA processes across multiple platforms including Android, iOS, Web, and APIs.
achievements: Directed QA practices across multiple cross-functional squads, ensuring high-quality product delivery.
Mentored junior engineers, facilitated onboarding, and conducted technical interviews for talent acquisition.
Established a robust test case management system using Xray and structured defect tracking in JIRA.
Engineered automated functional tests for Web, APIs, Android, and iOS platforms using Katalon Studio.
Developed comprehensive API automation suites with Postman and executed performance tests via JMeter.
Streamlined release cycles by integrating automated testing pipelines into Jenkins CI/CD.
Spearheaded R&D for modern testing tools and managed infrastructure for scalable test automation.

experience.description: Leading technical execution for regional B2B support services.
achievements: Translated complex business needs into detailed technical requirements and specifications aligned with customer objectives.
Orchestrated team resource allocation and collaborated with UI/UX designers to deliver intuitive, workflow-based interfaces.
Spearheaded agile implementation timelines, leading sprint planning to ensure timely delivery and goal alignment.
Analyzed operational incident tickets to identify root causes, improving monitoring mechanisms for enhanced visibility.
Leveraged incident data to refine product backlogs, significantly reducing recurring issues and streamlining development.
Partnered with Product Owners to drive strategic decision-making, prioritize tasks, and swiftly resolve technical obstacles.

experience.description: Conducted lectures on Software Quality Assurance and Testing methodologies.
achievements: Coordinated the QA Industrial Class program in partnership with Telkom Indonesia.
Delivered comprehensive mentoring sessions, guiding students through practical QA internships.
Designed and developed industry-aligned learning modules and evaluation materials.
Evaluated student performance through examinations, interactive activities, and real-world projects.

experience.description: Assisted in test execution and documentation during major software releases.
achievements: Executed manual testing across various projects to assist in major software releases.
Contributed to QA defect reporting and collaborated effectively in team triage meetings.
